ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "VIN" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in USD */,
  "odometer" INTEGER /* Odometer reading in kilometers */,
  "make" INTEGER /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Ford, Toyota) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "body_type" INTEGER /* Body type of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "drivetrain" INTEGER /* Drivetrain type (e.g., 4WD, FWD) */,
  "fuel" INTEGER /* Fuel type (e.g., petrol, diesel) */,
  "transmission" INTEGER /* Transmission type (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "colour" INTEGER /* Colour of the vehicle */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption in liters per 100 kilometers */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price agreed upon during the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, finance, lease) */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment amount for financed or leased vehicles */,
  "financing_terms" TEXT /* Financing terms (e.g., interest rate, loan duration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., added, sold, updated) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, service, administration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for subcategories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being categorized */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the vehicle belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_categories_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_categories_mapping_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_drives" (
  "test_drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test drive */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being test driven */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer taking the test drive */,
  "test_drive_date" TEXT /* Date of the test drive */,
  "test_drive_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the test drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_drives_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_drives_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_photos_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
